content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
NEUTRAL: Normal volatility (Vol: 35.3%) with mixed breadth (3/8 sectors positive).

2. Which sectors are leading?
Banking & Finance and Retail & Food are leading; Banking: HALKB (1W: +6.89% | 1M: +18.05%) ABOVE TREND, VAKBN (1W: +2.98% | 1M: +0.95%) ABOVE TREND. Retail: AEFES (1W: +5.49% | 1M: +2.55%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Energy & Chemicals and Holding & Investment are lagging; Energy: GUBRF (1W: -10.36% | 1M: -15.44%) BELOW TREND, PETKM (1W: -5.70% | 1M: -13.60%) BELOW TREND. Holding: DOHOL (1W: -8.25% | 1M: -12.42%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
HALKB (1W: +6.89% | 1M: +18.05%) ABOVE TREND; AEFES (1W: +5.49% | 1M: +2.55%) ABOVE TREND; TRMET (1W: +4.45% | 1M: -5.37%) RECOVERY; TSKB (1W: +4.15% | 1M: -3.43%) RECOVERY; TCELL (1W: +4.06% | 1M: -10.71%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
GUBRF (1W: -10.36% | 1M: -15.44%) BELOW TREND; DOHOL (1W: -8.25% | 1M: -12.42%) BELOW TREND; KONTR (1W: -8.15% | 1M: -26.05%) BELOW TREND; ENKAI (1W: -7.11% | 1M: -15.52%) BELOW TREND; PETKM (1W: -5.70% | 1M: -13.60%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Highest 1W movers: HALKB (1W: +6.89% | 1M: +18.05%) ABOVE TREND; AEFES (1W: +5.49% | 1M: +2.55%) ABOVE TREND; TRMET (1W: +4.45% | 1M: -5.37%) RECOVERY; TSKB (1W: +4.15% | 1M: -3.43%) RECOVERY; TCELL (1W: +4.06% | 1M: -10.71%) RECOVERY.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking showing defensive leadership but mixed underlying; HALKB (1W: +6.89% | 1M: +18.05%) ABOVE TREND, VAKBN (1W: +2.98% | 1M: +0.95%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +0.78% | 1M: -13.25%) RECOVERY, GARAN (1W: +1.71% | 1M: -8.49%) RECOVERY.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy and construction mixed: EREGL (1W: +1.31% | 1M: +5.34%) ABOVE TREND, FROTO (1W: +2.44% | 1M: -12.93%) RECOVERY, ALARK (1W: +2.55% | 1M: -1.79%) RECOVERY, ASELS (1W: -4.54% | 1M: -16.36%) BELOW TREND.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy under pressure with dispersion: HEKTS (1W: +3.50% | 1M: +12.50%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +3.67% | 1M: +7.32%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: +1.95% | 1M: -11.14%) RECOVERY, PETKM (1W: -5.70% | 1M: -13.60%) BELOW TREND, SASA (1W: -5.68% | 1M: -19.16%) BELOW TREND.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Neutral stance: favor selective overweight in high-quality banking names and proven industrial leaders (EREGL, HALKB) and maintain cash to add on confirmed breadth improvement; trim exposure to lagging holdings in Holding and weak Energy names.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
HALKB (1W: +6.89% | 1M: +18.05%) ABOVE TREND for continuation, EREGL (1W: +1.31% | 1M: +5.34%) ABOVE TREND for industrial rotation, GUBRF (1W: -10.36% | 1M: -15.44%) BELOW TREND for volatility-driven opportunities, TCELL (1W: +4.06% | 1M: -10.71%) RECOVERY for tech flow.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Banking & Finance for defensive leadership, Energy & Chemicals for headline-driven volatility, Heavy Industry for selective earnings/volume recovery.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Monitor XU100 reaction to global risk sentiment and Turkish macro prints; a sustained break above the recent 1-week high favors risk-on continuation while a breach of the 1-month low would signal deeper correction. Key catalysts: CPI and CBRT commentary, corporate earnings updates, and global risk-on/off moves.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Neutral regime: normal volatility (35.3%) with mixed breadth (3/8). Opportunities in selective banks and industrial leaders (HALKB, EREGL); risks concentrated in Holding and Energy where several names remain BELOW TREND and vulnerable to macro shocks.
